rationale_top3: Nature & Surroundings (14/15): Strong natural setting and environment, providing a peaceful bush/coastal atmosphere Cleanliness & Maintenance (13/15): Well-maintained facilities and grounds demonstrate good operational standards Value for Money (12/15): Pricing perceived as fair and reasonable for the amenities and location offered
rationale_honourable: Entertainment & Activities (8/10): Decent range of activities and entertainment options for families Sentiment & Experience (7/10): Generally positive guest experiences with friendly atmosphere
best_for: This park best suits families with older children or couples who prioritize cleanliness, peaceful riverside settings, and a central location for day trips over on-site kids' entertainment.
